tables.name: check_invoices
tables.comment: Links checks to the QBO invoices they pay

tables.name: customer_aliases
tables.comment: Maps check names to QBO customers for auto-matching

tables.name: import_staging
tables.comment: Temporary staging for historical check import from spreadsheet. Drop after import complete.

tables.name: qbo_deposits_cache
tables.comment: Temporary cache of QBO Deposit line items for reconciliation matching. Drop after import complete.

tables.name: qbo_payments_cache
tables.comment: Temporary cache of QBO Payment records for bulk matching. Drop after import complete.

tables.name: scanned_checks
tables.comment: Check deposits scanned for processing into QBO

tables.name: autopay_customers
tables.comment: Source of truth for which customers are enrolled in autopay. Replaces Airtable roster.

tables.name: autopay_events
tables.comment: Immutable event log for autopay transactions.

tables.name: autopay_transactions
tables.comment: Single source of truth for monthly autopay billing.

tables.name: billing_runs
tables.comment: Master record per monthly billing cycle.

tables.name: cdc_cursors
tables.comment: Per-source watermarks for incremental reconciliation.

tables.name: drift_log
tables.comment: Every cache-vs-QBO mismatch detected by the CDC reconciler.

tables.name: webhook_expectations
tables.comment: Tracks outbound writes that should produce QBO webhooks.

tables.name: webhook_log
tables.comment: Audit trail of every QBO webhook arrival.

tables.name: chemical_cost_estimates
tables.comment: Pre-computed chemical cost percentiles.

tables.name: consumable_items
tables.comment: Whitelist of consumable/chemical items.

tables.name: card_charge_attempts
tables.comment: Write-ahead log for card vault charge attempts.

tables.name: inventory_section_items
tables.comment: Assigns items to sections.

tables.name: inventory_sections
tables.comment: Physical sections within a location.

tables.name: invoice_processing_log
tables.comment: Audit log for automated invoice processing workflow.

tables.name: spot_check_queue
tables.comment: Items flagged for individual counting.

tables.name: switch_to_weekly_campaign
tables.comment: Bi-weekly customers targeted for switch-to-weekly email campaign

tables.name: system_alerts
tables.comment: Outbound alert queue.

scripts.summary: Batch geocode maintenance customer addresses using Google Maps Geocoding API
Validate and normalize service addresses (skips already done)
Sync a Supabase customer record to QuickBooks Online
Create a QBO customer from a new lead and update Supabase
Generic SMS sender via RingCentral (office-routed, lead-logged)
Generic email sender via Gmail API (office-branded, lead-logged)
Download PDF attachments from Gmail emails to Supabase
Extract structured data from Allied Universal invoice PDFs
Send pending system_alerts via Gmail (cron, every 5 min)
Load maintenance invoices for a billing month from QBO into Supabase
Remove late fee charges from QBO invoices via credit memo + $0 application
Delete (void) a QBO Payment by ID
Pull payments + credit memos; resolve payment method names; track was_charged
Hold cursor on inline-refresh failure so next run retries
Single-customer QBO credits refresh + multi-invoice status recheck
Optional qbo_body + OCC guard + did_write return
Auto-flip also checks for succeeded attempt (covers invoice-email path)
One-time: pull ALL unapplied credits (no date filter) + re-evaluate WOs
Align QBO TxnDate to wo.completed in the enrichment PATCH
Pre-confirm webhook_expectations when webhook arrived before insert
Pre-confirm webhook_expectations when webhook arrived before insert
Single-CreditMemo QBO -> Supabase refresh; targeted recheck of linked invoices
Use QBO Payment query (Intuit V4 has no listCharges endpoint)
Pull QBO invoices into billing.invoices + match WOs (bulk or single-WO mode)
Process work order: apply credits, charge card/ACH, send invoice via QBO
Sync open invoice balances from QBO into maintenance_invoices
Send autopay decline notification email via Gmail API
Switch to Weekly Campaign - Batch send
Login + return full session JSON for external session-lifetime probing
Stage-by-stage timing for ION report fetches (7-day vs 30-day)
Picker-prime + bare-data fetch test for CompletedLogDetail.cfm
End-to-end pipeline test (fetch -> parse -> normalize -> upsert)
Diagnose every unresolved ION row with nearest-neighbor matches
ION login + cookie-based authed fetch helpers
Landing page for bi-weekly to weekly switch email campaign
One-off: backfill acceptance_link from est_emails HTML
One-off: backfill PDFs ignoring status filter
ION Recon 3: Task edit form + save endpoint mapping
ION Recon: Map customer task endpoints
Backfill missing estimate PDFs from est_emails HTML body
ION Recon 2: Robyn Cheek task detail + edit form mapping
